The '''''Juggernaut''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] active in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], ''Juggernaut'' was stationed in the [[Kuat system/Legends|Kuat system]]. It was sent to rescue the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[Kuat Facility]] after it fell under attack by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilots, but arrived too late to do so. One of the Rebel attackers was [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] who destroyed the facility and then had to pass near ''Juggernaut'' and reach the [[Hyperspace navigation buoy|Hyperspace Navigation Buoy]] to the Rebel fleet.<ref name="XwA" />

The vessel was later part of [[Task Force Vengeance]] where it was tasked with retrieving the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] ''[[Compellor]]'' together with the Star Destroyer [[Titan (Imperial-class)|''Titan'']]. The two warships subsequently launched an [[Retreat from Gallofree|unsuccessful attack]] on the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam]] [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|X7 factory]] ''[[Gallofree]]''.<ref name="BoP" />
